sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22371" key="gluku/kreos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γλῠκύ-κρεος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n22371.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of sweet flesh</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κογχύλιον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">24</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
